TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Chishang Nsgan Chishang o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 79.23 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 12.44 km², dxgal pmblxan o 1.05 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 7,640, sapah o 2,901, seejiq tnpusu 2,162 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 28%(Sbnawan). Nsgan alang o seejiq klmukan ka pusu(hbaraw) balay. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Chishang o niqan 8 alang ni maxal 9. 9 o, Kalokapuk , Muliyaw , Cikowa'ay , Dihekoay , Ciataw , Cipuwa , Fangafangasan , Kawaliwali , Cicala'ay . pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: ʦħisħaŋ nsgan ʦħisħaŋ o gaga nsgan taituŋ, kmpɾaan kana dxgal o **.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o **.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o *.** km*). kmħbɾagan ħiji o *,***, sapaħ o *,***, səəɟiq tnpusu *,*** ħiji, knħbɾagan ħiji o **%(sbnawan). nsgan alaŋ o səəɟiq klmukan ka pusu(ħbaɾaw) balaj. njusan qpaħan nsgan ʦħisħaŋ o niqan * alaŋ ni maxal *. * o, kalokapuk , mulijaw , ʦikowa'aj , diħəkoaj , ʦiataw , ʦipuwa , *aŋa*aŋasan , kawaliwali , ʦiʦala'aj . pusupnjaħan patas
S.FORM: Chishang Nsgan Chishang o gaga Nsgan Taitung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 79.23 km², (dxgal dgiyaq o 12.44 km², dxgal pmblxan o 1.05 km²). kmhbragan hiyi o 7,640, sapah o 2,901, seejiq tnpusu 2,162 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 28%(Sbnawan). Nsgan alang o seejiq klmukan ka pusu(hbaraw) balay. nyusan qpahan Nsgan Chishang o niqan 8 alang ni maxal 9. 9 o, Kalokapuk , Muliyaw , Cikowa'ay , Dihekoay , Ciataw , Cipuwa , Fangafangasan , Kawaliwali , Cicala'ay . pusupnyahan patas
